title: Knowledge assistant security
text: Internal knowledge assistants are deployed with SSO support and internal-only data access so company information stays private and access-controlled. The same delivery approach also uses audit trails and secure environments when assistants or agents work with sensitive business data.

title: Chatbot integrations
text: Chatbots built by Teeny Tech Trek can integrate with Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Airtable, Google Workspace, Intercom, WhatsApp, Discord, Webflow, and Typeform. These integrations let the assistant answer questions, fetch context, and hand work off to the systems your team already uses.

title: Automation reliability safeguards
text: Automation reliability is supported through secure credential storage, custom logging, fail-safe alerts, and monitoring that helps teams spot problems early. This keeps workflow automations dependable even when they coordinate data across several tools and APIs.

title: E-commerce support chatbot case study
text: Teeny Tech Trek built an e-commerce support chatbot that handled FAQs, tracked orders, and escalated complex issues to human agents. The deployment reduced ticket volume by 40 percent and improved customer satisfaction by answering a large share of routine questions automatically.

title: Chatbot Services
text: AI chatbots can help organizations collect customer feedback and analyze user behavior.

title: Onboarding assistant case study
text: An onboarding assistant built by Teeny Tech Trek guided new users through setup and helped them understand the product faster. The bot improved user activation by 25 percent by answering setup questions in context and keeping the onboarding flow moving.

title: Agentic workflow case studies
text: One agentic workflow scraped competitor pricing each week, updated Airtable, and notified the team in Slack with the latest changes. Another workflow digested survey responses, flagged pain points, and posted summaries to Notion, saving hours of manual review time.

title: AI app MVP case studies
text: A lightweight MVP uploaded PDFs, summarized important legal clauses, and surfaced contract details for faster review. Related AI app work also included a client portal that generated outreach scripts with Stripe billing and a Streamlit legal review app that cut contract review time by 70 percent.

title: Consultation credit toward pilot
text: A consultation can be credited 100 percent toward a four-week pilot when the project starts within 30 days of the session. This helps teams use the strategy conversation as the first paid step toward a focused production pilot instead of treating it as separate spend.

title: Booking, rescheduling, and NDA FAQ
text: Bookings include a calendar invite with a Google Meet link, and sessions can be rescheduled up to 24 hours before the selected slot. If needed, Teeny Tech Trek can also sign a mutual NDA before the session so sensitive business context can be discussed more comfortably.

title: Privacy policy data collection
text: The privacy policy explains that Teeny Tech Trek may collect contact details such as name, email address, and phone number, along with business details submitted through consultations or proposals. It also covers browser, device, IP, and usage data, plus payment details processed through providers such as Razorpay or Stripe and newsletter data collected through tools like Mailchimp.

title: Privacy policy rights and protections
text: The privacy policy states that cookies and similar technologies are used to understand website interactions, track conversions, and measure service interest. It also explains that users can request access or corrections, withdraw consent, unsubscribe, and expect reasonable technical and organizational safeguards around stored data.

title: Refund eligibility policy
text: The refund policy says payments are generally final because the work is customized and consultative, but refunds may be issued in specific cases. Examples include a cancellation within 48 hours before work begins, duplicate payment for the same service, or a custom refund clause stated in a signed proposal or agreement.

title: Terms, scope, and payments
text: The terms explain that project scope, pricing, deliverables, and timelines are defined in a separate proposal or agreement, and services are provided on a best-effort basis. The policy also notes that payments follow agreed milestones or packages and that delayed payment can pause or terminate service.

title: Sales workflow automation case study
text: A sales automation workflow connected lead capture, proposal generation, CRM updates, and follow-up communication in one process. This saved the sales team 15 hours per week and reduced the manual effort required to keep prospects moving through the pipeline.

title: Investment research assistant case study
text: A research assistant for an investment team gathered company information, analyzed financial reports, and produced investment summaries for analysts. This reduced manual research time and showed how agentic systems can combine retrieval, structured analysis, and repeatable reporting.

title: HR assistant case study
text: An HR assistant helped a growing tech startup answer employee questions from internal knowledge faster, reducing response time from days to minutes. Similar internal assistants are designed to surface policy answers clearly while keeping the knowledge experience grounded in company documentation.
